records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So soft... So fluffy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So soft... So fluffy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So soft... So fluffy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haven't you touched my ears enough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haven't you touched my ears enough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haven't you touched my ears enough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I'm sorry! I meant to treat you, but your ears were so mesmerizing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I'm sorry! I meant to treat you, but your ears were so mesmerizing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I'm sorry! I meant to treat you, but your ears were so mesmerizing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wondering, but... do all stars have such pretty ears and tails?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wondering, but... do all stars have such pretty ears and tails?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wondering, but... do all stars have such pretty ears and tails?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm not a star. My name is Paradox. And this tail has been passed down for generations from my ancestors in Byrwood
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm not a star. My name is Paradox. And this tail has been passed down for generations from my ancestors in Byrwood
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm not a star. My name is Paradox. And this tail has been passed down for generations from my ancestors in Byrwood
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, may I call you Parry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, may I call you Parry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, may I call you Parry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you're not even listening to a word I'm saying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you're not even listening to a word I'm saying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you're not even listening to a word I'm saying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... are you mad at me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... are you mad at me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... are you mad at me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a long time since I had a proper conversation with anyone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a long time since I had a proper conversation with anyone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a long time since I had a proper conversation with anyone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I won't talk anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I won't talk anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I won't talk anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long have you been here alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long have you been here alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long have you been here alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...? Mm mmph mmph?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...? Mm mmph mmph?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...? Mm mmph mmph?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... No one told you to cover your mouth! You can talk, so take your hand off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... No one told you to cover your mouth! You can talk, so take your hand off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... No one told you to cover your mouth! You can talk, so take your hand off.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Paha
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Paha
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Paha
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm, from what Mother taught me... I've been alone for five birthdays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm, from what Mother taught me... I've been alone for five birthdays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm, from what Mother taught me... I've been alone for five birthdays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And tomorrow is my sixth. And I won't have to spend it alone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And tomorrow is my sixth. And I won't have to spend it alone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And tomorrow is my sixth. And I won't have to spend it alone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like tomatoes? They might not be ripe yet, but they're still delicious! I even picked a lot of apricots the other day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like tomatoes? They might not be ripe yet, but they're still delicious! I even picked a lot of apricots the other day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like tomatoes? They might not be ripe yet, but they're still delicious! I even picked a lot of apricots the other day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I know that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I know that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I know that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hero...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hero...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hero...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, it is pretty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, it is pretty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, it is pretty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It also smells familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It also smells familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It also smells familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it concerns me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it concerns me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it concerns me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I guess?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I guess?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I guess?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. You're still growing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. You're still growing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. You're still growing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Genetics...? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Genetics...? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Genetics...? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Goodnight, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. Goodnight, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Goodnight, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could I swing it a few times later?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could I swing it a few times later?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could I swing it a few times later?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Zzz...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Zzz...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Zzz...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like tomatoes? They might not be ripe yet, but they're still delicious! I even picked a lot of apricots the other day!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but I didn't come here to have fun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I know that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I know that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I know that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You came down to grant someone their wish, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A wish...? Well, you're not wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here to retrieve what the Administration left your mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the location hasn't changed, it should still be at the center of the garden.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration...?! Then you must be the hero of the Administration!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hero...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hero...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hero...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry! I'll guide you into the garden!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother told me once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother told me once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother told me once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That when the world was in crisis, the heroes of the Administration appeared and saved us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in return, we protect the Administration's treasure. So that when they come back one day, we can return it to them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a hero. Let's just say that I'm an advisor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An advisor? Then, are advisors not heroes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... I see. I also heard that heroes are busy protecting the world outside of the garden. I guess they don't have the time to come here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Mother couldn't go along with them. With me in her belly, she thought she'd be a hindrance to the busy heroes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, the bleeding should stop and your wound will heal quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I even tied it in a pretty ribbon shape. Isn't it pretty? I learned it from Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, it is pretty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, it is pretty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, it is pretty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure to return the Administration's treasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think of the flower tea? Isn't it fragrant? Do you like it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It just tastes like water... but the scent is sweet, like a fruit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It also smells familiar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It also smells familiar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It also smells familiar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! I knew Mother's friends would notice!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is tea made from a flower called Calendula.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But after Mother left... there's no Calendula in the garden anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why did Pavlin leave you alone here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because Mother is an adult. It's natural that she goes on adventures.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Adults are busy and cannot take care of their children forever. They must always be responsible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I may not be an adult, but I understand that much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She hasn't been back for 6 years. Doesn't that concern you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it concerns me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it concerns me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it concerns me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... I made a promise. That I'll take care of the garden instead of her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I neglect the garden out of concern for Mother, she'll be disappointed when she returns.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have a strong sense of responsibility, Solovey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must. Because I want to become an adult as fast as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're an adult too because you're friends with Mother, aren't you, Parry?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I guess?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I guess?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I guess?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. You're an adult, but you're as tall as me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought that I'd become a tall adult like Mother when I grow up, but I guess I could stop growing at this height.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I planned on learning how to make bigger clothes when Mother returned, but I guess I worried for nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. You're still growing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. You're still growing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. You're still growing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's different for each person, but genetics still count.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Genetics...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Genetics...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Genetics...? What's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It means that children and their parents usually look alike. In both personality and appearance...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like genetics! I've always wanted to be like Mother!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But, that will depend on how much effort you put in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't eat well and oversleep, while relying solely on genetics, you might become a short adult like me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Goodnight, then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. Goodnight, then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Goodnight, then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I don't think being small is that bad. You're cute, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop talking nonsense and go to bed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to have to be my guide tomorrow morning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know. I'm glad you're here, Parry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother said that I wasn't allowed to enter the inner yard until I became an adult.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since you're an adult, I should be able to enter it with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I might even bump into Mother on her adventure. I'm sure she'll be so surprised to see us, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does this treasure look like? Mother never showed it to me once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! And what do the heroes look like? Is there anyone taller than Mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard Mother's master was skilled with a sword. But I've never seen a sword in person before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could I swing it a few times later?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could I swing it a few times later?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could I swing it a few times later?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to grow if you keep talking and don't go to bed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Zzz...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Zzz...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Zzz...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place was made by Pavlin's isolation ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Being separated from the world, time should be suspended forever in here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how time is flowing, it could only mean that there's a problem with the isolation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I knew this wouldn't go as smoothly as I thought it would. I wanted to at least bring Valkyrie with me no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know she wouldn't die that easily, but... I wonder what happened to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know she wouldn't die that easily, but... I wonder what happened to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know she wouldn't die that easily, but... I wonder what happened to her.
